title: More Immersive Minecraft
description: A Minecraft modpack that makes the game more immersive and optimized ,can be used on any server (that doesn't require another loader).
body:
# More Immersive Minecraft

More Immersive Minecraft is a modpack designed to make your Minecraft experience more engaging and realistic. This pack focuses on enhancing visuals, sounds, and gameplay features to bring you closer to the world around you. From improved environmental effects, dynamic weather, and realistic sounds to subtle gameplay changes, it adds depth to every moment in the game.

Whether you're exploring, building, or surviving, More Immersive Minecraft will make you feel like you're truly a part of the world, without breaking the vanilla experience. Ideal for players who want a more atmospheric and captivating Minecraft!

![Realistic Survival in first person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uNAOBd56/images/63bf4236bb96eb33579ed010e65b8a3b09ce2839_350.webp)

## Key Mods:

**First Person Model**: Experience your character in first-person mode with full-body animations, adding more immersion to your gameplay.

**Shoulder Surfing Reloaded**: Gain more control over your third-person camera, providing a smooth, enhanced perspective.

**Presence Footsteps**: Adds more immersive footstep sounds based on the surface you walk on, giving a unique audio experience for every block type.

**Sodium & Iris Shaders**: Optimization mods that improve performance and visual quality with the ability to use shaders, making the game look stunning without requiring server-side installation.

![Present Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uNAOBd56/images/231b78c6ed2ca7608bba3dcba286bb0e9ce4cad9_350.webp)
There are many more mods in this pack that further enrich the gameplay. All of these mods work on any server (thats vanilla or fabric), even those that don’t have these mods installed! 
*
YDM's Weapon Master have custom config
